## Results Summary
**make fast-ci failed with exit code 2**
Despite the overall exit code failure, almost all checks passed. The failure was caused by **Prettier format violations**:
**Formatting Issues:** - Code style issues found in 2 files - Files flagged: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passing Checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format check (ruff): 1631 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK (reference.md is up to date) - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5523 passed in 22.54s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.36s - Tests (erk-statusline): 112 passed in 0.81s - Tests (erkbot): 114 passed in 2.18s
**Total Tests: 5885 passed**
The two markdown files need Prettier formatting applied to pass the fast-ci pipeline.
